questions: GAN er use case ki ki?
GAN diye ki image banano jay?
answers: GAN stands for Generative Adversarial Network. It consists of two neural networks — a generator that creates fake data and a discriminator that tries to tell real from fake. They compete and both get better over time.
GAN holo ekta deep learning model jekhane duita network — generator ar discriminator — eke oporer sathe compete kore. Generator fake data banay, discriminator seta real na fake detect kore.
GANs are used for image generation, deepfakes, art creation, data augmentation, and more. The generator learns to create increasingly realistic outputs by fooling the discriminator.

Generative Adversarial Networks work like a forger vs detective game. The generator tries to create realistic content while the discriminator tries to catch fakes. This adversarial process produces amazingly realistic results.
